artifacts.title: Ppl receipt from 2025-04-07
artifacts.excerpt: sincere question: how do ppl actually date multiple ppl at once when it comes to dating them past ~3 dates? i feel like i'm decisive by then, and past that, my attention gets watered down and i can't bring my best self to any one scenario. i respect other peoples' time and my own

artifacts.title: Ppl receipt from 2025-04-30
artifacts.excerpt: no one stalks you harder than the ppl who are aware you took the high road and can't face themselves for the ways they hadn't. they're paranoid that you'll destroy them with the truth. there's perpetual tension while feeling them perceive your sustained "i could but i will not"
